preflight_rules: keys must exactly match the five approved Wave 1 English content page keys
records must be existing draft/non-public/unpublished/non-indexable targets or already-published idempotency matches
records must include the GLOBAL-EN-ZH-CONTENT-PAGES-CMS-DRAFT-UPDATE-01 source marker
R2 readiness artifact must approve all_five_pages
foundation must retain planned public-benefit shareholding language
foundation forbidden legal/foundation overclaims must be absent
no record creation, upsert, out-of-scope CMS write, Search Channel action, URL submission, external search API call, deploy, sitemap/llms/footer/nav enablement is allowed
transactionality: execute mode wraps publish writes in a single database transaction
idempotency: already-published target records are skipped without record creation, upsert, duplicate publish, or out-of-scope writes

discoverability_coupling_policy.reason: Existing sitemap inclusion for content_pages requires published, public, and is_indexable=true. The runtime preserves is_indexable=false and blocks pre-indexable targets so sitemap/llms exposure remains a separate task.

next_task: BACKEND-DEPLOY-READINESS｜Deploy content pages controlled publish runtime
